title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. vineale
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. vineale is a subspecies of the Rockrose plant, commonly found in coastal areas and dry scrublands in Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. vineale include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. vineale can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
